mapper.select: SELECT player_id,p.team_id,name,name_eng,position,nationality,height,weight,TO_CHAR(birth_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS dbday,back_number,img_url,t.team_name,t.emblem,likecount FROM KLeague_Player p JOIN KLeague_Team t ON p.team_id=t.team_id WHERE player_id=#{player_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE KLeague_Player SET likecount=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM myLike WHERE player_id=#{player_id}) WHERE player_id=#{player_id}
